notes: Fix paragraph-skip looping: tapping +¶ or -¶ during TTS playback used to leave the previous runTtsLoop alive concurrently with the new one — both incrementing the shared sentence index, which made the cursor jump several paragraphs per tap. Each TTS loop now captures a generation token; when startReading is called (from a paragraph skip or anywhere else), the token bumps and the previous loop exits at its next checkpoint. One tap = one paragraph jump.
